title: Kasam

title: Kasam
subTitle: Rishi and Tanu reach Saloni's house and get her to come with them. Back home, Bani is worried that Neha and Rishi's wedding might be called off, leaving her dreams to get rich, unfulfilled. Will Saloni speak the truth about Pawan?

title: Kasam
subTitle: Saloni shocks everyone when she reveals that she is Akshay's wife and not Pawan's. With Tanu and Pawan's wedding date being fixed, Bani is extremely happy that her plan to get Neha married to Rishi is taking shape.
